title: Ops Demo Launchpad
subtitle: One Heroku landing page for the 12 demo apps. Each card redirects to the live target Heroku app.

apps.name: Release Risk Copilot
apps.description: Policy-first release risk assessment with deterministic rules, evidence retrieval, and AI-generated explanations.

apps.name: Incident Triage Evidence Agent
apps.description: Deterministic incident triage with grounded evidence and optional LLM memo.

apps.name: False Green Dashboard Simulator
apps.description: Deterministic simulator showing false-green dashboards and hidden failure drift.

apps.name: Runbook Grounding Agent
apps.description: Grounded runbook Q&A with deterministic retrieval, citation enforcement, and abstention.

apps.name: Change Impact Mapper
apps.description: Deterministic blast radius mapping over a synthetic hybrid dependency graph.

apps.name: Flaky Test Detective
apps.description: Deterministic flake detection and remediation recommendations over synthetic CI history.

apps.name: Ops Agent Eval Harness
apps.description: Eval harness for operations-focused agent workflows with deterministic scenarios and scoring.

apps.name: Validation Signal Aggregator
apps.description: Aggregates validation signals into a deterministic release-readiness view.

apps.name: Cutover Commander
apps.description: Guided cutover planning and status tracking for operational change windows.

apps.name: AI Security Gateway Demo
apps.description: Backend AI security gateway demo showing RBAC, tool allowlisting, approvals, masking, and auditing.

apps.name: Developer Friction Analyzer
apps.description: Finds recurring sources of developer friction and highlights deterministic remediation areas.

apps.name: Ops Superforecaster Lab
apps.description: Operational forecasting lab for scenario scoring, confidence tracking, and decision support.
